narrative:
Sylvania City has 13,709 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
